repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Greek NF M 90, SPP No. 363
full_text_tesim: Fol. 15 was originally a bifolio from a much smaller Ethiopian book, now turned at 90 degrees to form an individual folio in the Greek codex. The gutter fold of the original bifolio is still visible. Because of the wear in the center of the Ethiopian folio, it is not possible to tell if there were originally two or four columns. Only the outer edges of the text block are discernible. The original size of the bifolio suggests that this was only one column
UTO Sinai Greek NF M 90, SPP No. 363
Written in a medium-sized hand, with average to mediocre competence
